AI Maze Runner

Loading the standalone app...

If this message disappears, MazeRunner loaded normally. If it stays on screen or you only see a blank page, your browser is probably blocking part of the direct file:// startup path.

Best fallback: run npm.cmd start in the project folder and open http://127.0.0.1:4173/. If you need pure standalone mode, use a full desktop browser like Chrome or Edge instead of a preview pane.
